name: Zoroa, the Magistus Verethragna
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜王絶火</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>マギストス・ウルスラグナ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ゾロア
name_jp_tl_base: Zoroa, the Dragon King Absolute Fire
desc:
1 "Magistus" monster + 1 Fusion, Synchro, Xyz, or Link Monster
You can target 1 Effect Monster in your GY or your opponent controls; equip that Effect Monster to this card. When a monster effect is activated (Quick Effect): You can send 1 face-up "Magistus" Monster Card you control to the GY; negate that effect, then you can destroy 1 card your opponent controls. You can only use each effect of "Zoroa, the Magistus Verethragna" once per turn.
mnst_eff:
1 "Magistus" monster + 1 Fusion, Synchro, Xyz, or Link Monster
You can target 1 Effect Monster in your GY or your opponent controls; equip that Effect Monster to this card. When a monster effect is activated (Quick Effect): You can send 1 face-up "Magistus" Monster Card you control to the GY; negate that effect, then you can destroy 1 card your opponent controls. You can only use each effect of "Zoroa, the Magistus Verethragna" once per turn.
eff:
1 "Magistus" monster + 1 Fusion, Synchro, Xyz, or Link Monster
You can target 1 Effect Monster in your GY or your opponent controls; equip that Effect Monster to this card. When a monster effect is activated (Quick Effect): You can send 1 face-up "Magistus" Monster Card you control to the GY; negate that effect, then you can destroy 1 card your opponent controls. You can only use each effect of "Zoroa, the Magistus Verethragna" once per turn.

action: Equips monsters from the opponent's field to itself
Equips monsters from the player's Graveyard to itself
Sends from field to Graveyard for cost
mst: Negates the effects of Effect Monsters
summoning: Requires Fusion Monsters as Fusion Materials
Requires Synchro Monsters as Fusion Materials
Requires Xyz Monsters as Fusion Materials
Requires Link Monsters as Fusion Materials
